/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libbwi_perception_interface__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libbwi_perception_interface__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/bwi_perception_interface__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/bwi_perception_interface/msg/detail/dl_amcl_coords__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/nikunj/bwi_ros2_simulation/build/bwi_perception_interface: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libbwi_perception_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.24 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
